comment: Self-contained (no extends) so the standalone `pnpm deploy` image needs no repo-root file. rootDir is two levels up — always a common ancestor of src/ and the bundled @eigen-auction/shared .ts, both in dev (repo root) and in the deployed image (/) — which is what ts-node needs to emit across the package boundary.

ts-node.comment: In the `pnpm deploy` image, @eigen-auction/shared is bundled as .ts files INSIDE node_modules. ts-node ignores node_modules by default, so un-ignore just that package (everything else in node_modules is JS and should be loaded by Node directly). Locally shared is symlinked outside node_modules, where this is a harmless no-op.
